When one would get the Job?
In a native's horoscope, if the aspect of transit Jupiter falls
on natal Saturn or in transit when Saturn transits on natal Jupiter,
the native is getting the job, Leaving the infancy stage I years of
the native, benefic results would be there for the coming years
of the native under the above periods, It is essential & beneficial
to know the directions of the signs. (Mesha, Simha & Dhanus
